Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Jury says Meta knowingly harmed children for profit, awarding landmark verdict 65 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. Microbenchmarking Chipsets for Giggles 40 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Show HN: I took back Video.js after 16 years and we rewrote it to be 88% smaller 553 upvotes, 114 comments
  4. VNDB founder Yorhel has died 141 upvotes, 24 comments
  5. Show HN: I built a site that maps the web from a bounty hunter's perspective 14 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Hubble Snaps a New Dazzling Photo of the Crab Nebula 31 upvotes, 3 comments
  7. The Last Testaments of Richard II and Henry IV 68 upvotes, 13 comments
  8. Slovenian officials catch Israeli firm Black Cube trying to manipulate vote 222 upvotes, 59 comments
  9. TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression 385 upvotes, 113 comments
  10. My Astrophotography in the Movie Project Hail Mary 347 upvotes, 105 comments
  11. Flighty Airports 459 upvotes, 162 comments
  12. Musketeer d'Artagnan's remains believed found under Dutch church 33 upvotes, 6 comments
  13. I wanted to build vertical SaaS for pest control, so I took a technician job 388 upvotes, 164 comments
  14. Quantization from the Ground Up 24 upvotes, 5 comments
  15. Building a coding agent in Swift from scratch 42 upvotes, 12 comments
  16. Local LLM App by Ente 241 upvotes, 107 comments
  17. Antimatter has been transported for the first time 145 upvotes, 63 comments
  18. Tell HN: Litellm 1.82.7 and 1.82.8 on PyPI are compromised 857 upvotes, 462 comments
  19. Apple Business 697 upvotes, 391 comments
  20. VitruvianOS – Desktop Linux Inspired by the BeOS 273 upvotes, 172 comments
  21. Supreme Court Sides with Cox in Copyright Fight over Pirated Music 122 upvotes, 72 comments
  22. Goodbye to Sora 973 upvotes, 725 comments
  23. Arm AGI CPU 391 upvotes, 288 comments
  24. Why I forked httpx 213 upvotes, 151 comments
  25. Thoughts on Slowing the Fuck Down 132 upvotes, 90 comments
  26. Sony V. Cox Decision Reversed 42 upvotes, 27 comments
  27. A Eulogy for Vim 77 upvotes, 60 comments
  28. Looking at Unity made me understand the point of C++ coroutines 110 upvotes, 94 comments
  29. Data centers are transitioning from AC to DC 232 upvotes, 287 comments
  30. Miscellanea: The War in Iran 193 upvotes, 244 comments

Last generated 1:30am, 26 March 2026. Source here.
